benefits.description: Crazy muscle pumps during workouts, fuller appearance, loves the results

side_effects.description: Water retention in cheek muscles causing overbite and difficulty chewing

protocol_notes: Currently running 24iu daily without titration (just jumped on dose and stuck with it). Previously tried lower doses (under 12iu) and reported minimal noticeable effects. Also uses steroids which help with insulin sensitivity and blood sugar control affected by HGH. Reports that at doses under 12iu, does not feel major effects beyond better pumps and fuller appearance.
